---
title: 'Vacation Get Away Ideas'
date: '2015-02-09T04:15:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '4873619374587186059'
blogger_filename: '/p/social.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
---

<h3>
I've GOT to get out of here!</h3>
<br />
Just because you live in an area doesn't mean you stay there, at least it shouldn't, take a vacation man! So here are some other places we've enjoyed visiting (and/or want to visit) in and out of &nbsp;DFW and even out of Texas.<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Nearby</h4>
<div>
<br /></div>
JUST enough outside DFW for me to consider not DFW but worth taking a day trip to.<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li>Denton</li>
<li><br /></li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Within Texas</h4>
Places that I would NOT drive to and back in a day from DFW, but would spend a night, or more.<br />
<ul>
<li><a href="http://visitsanantonio.com/english/Explore-San-Antonio" target="_blank">San Antonio</a></li>
<li><a href="http://texaslivinginfo.blogspot.com/2014/01/texas-hill-country.html">Texas Hill Country</a></li>
</ul>
<br />
<h4>
Outside of Texas</h4>
<br />
<ul>
<li><a href="http://www.yelp.com/biz/white-sands-national-monument-alamogordo" target="_blank">New Mexico: White Sands</a></li>
<li><a href="https://disneyland.disney.go.com/" target="_blank">California: Disneyland - Cal Adventures</a></li>
<li><a href="http://california.legoland.com/" target="_blank">California: Lego Land</a></li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
